description:
12 Disk Tools in One Package!

Need to backup and restore your disks, recover deleted documents and photos,
erase disks securely, monitor HDD health, or even repair PC when Windows can't
start normally?

Active@ Data Studio is a set of desktop applications and a bootable CD/DVD or
USB Disk for booting up any system into a Windows Recovery Environment.
- Active@ KillDisk 26
- Active@ Boot Disk 26
- Active@ Disk Image 26
- Active@ Disk Editor 26
- Active@ UNDELETE 26
- Active@ File Recovery 26
- Active@ ISO Manager 26
- Active@ Partition Manager 26
- Active@ Partition Recovery 26
- Active@ Password Changer 26
- Boot Disk: WinPE upgraded to Windows 11 26H1 code base
